channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: Ellie the elephant
item.description: Meet Big Ellie, the elephant mascot of the WNBA's New York Liberty. Plus more uplifting news.

item.title: DOJ lawyer states in court filing that 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is not proceeding
item.description: A DOJ attorney said in a court filing Friday that the Trump administration's Anti-Weaponization Fund has not been established and is no longer moving forward.

item.title: Graham Platner faces new controversy days before Maine Senate primary
item.description: The New York Times reported allegations of unsettling behavior toward women he dated.

item.title: No bags, no watch parties: What to expect when Trump attends NBA Finals
item.description: Officials plan heightened security as President Trump watches the Knicks face the Spurs.
